title: OSI Model Concept Check 1
questionText: Which statement best describes a key concept in OSI Model?
options: OSI Model should be analyzed using correctness, complexity, and edge cases.
OSI Model never affects performance.
OSI Model is only useful in frontend styling.
OSI Model cannot be discussed in interviews.
explanation: A good technical answer explains OSI Model, why it matters, complexity or trade-offs, and an example edge case.
